reforms.description: The Japanese government provided financial assistance through grants, concessional loans, and tax benefits to promote the development of technologically-advanced industries, including industrial machinery and information electronics.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: The financial assistance is aimed at fostering innovation and technological development, which can enhance productivity and economic growth.
reforms.status_evidence: The reform has been actively providing financial assistance as stated.
reforms.importance_rationale: The reform represents a significant policy change aimed at supporting advanced industries, indicating its major importance.
reforms.source_quote: The expansion of technologically-sophisticated industries was promoted by specific development plans formulated by MITI and government financial assistance provided under various schemes.

reforms.description: The Japanese government implemented measures to modernize and rationalize small and medium-sized enterprises, including low-interest credits and tax privileges for equipment modernization.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: The measures aim to enhance the competitiveness of SMEs, which can lead to increased innovation and economic growth.
reforms.status_evidence: The measures have been put into practice to support SMEs.
reforms.importance_rationale: The reform is significant in supporting SMEs but does not represent a structural change.
reforms.source_quote: Adjustment was facilitated by various government measures, notably low interest credits, an extension of the repayment period on loans obtained for the modernisation of equipment and granting of tax privileges.
